evaluation_order: 1. Hard stops — any single hard stop = DO_NOT_PROCEED immediately

outcomes.DO_NOT_PROCEED: Hard stop triggered. No payment shown. Attorney referral shown.
outcomes.ATTORNEY_RECOMMENDED: Attorney flags present. Show acknowledgment gate. If acknowledged, treat as PROCEED_RISK.
outcomes.PROCEED_RISK: Risk flags only. Payment unlocked. Persistent risk banner shown throughout.
outcomes.PROCEED: No flags. Payment unlocked. Clean eligibility confirmation shown.

hard_stops.question: Q0-01
trigger: non_treaty_country
hard_stops.note: Q0-01 is a searchable_select - system checks selected country against treaty_countries.json

hard_stops.question: Q0-03
trigger: In the United States — without valid status

hard_stops.question: Q0-04
trigger: I do not have funds available right now

hard_stops.question: Q0-03
trigger: In another country
hard_stops.message: As of September 6, 2025, E-2 visa applications must be filed at a consulate in your country of nationality or legal residence. Third-country processing is no longer available.

attorney_flags.question: Q0-03
trigger: In the United States — I am not sure of my status

attorney_flags.question: Q0-03
trigger: In another country
attorney_flags.message: As of September 6, 2025, E-2 visa applications must be filed at a consulate in your country of nationality or legal residence. Processing at a third-country consulate is no longer permitted. If you are temporarily abroad, you will need to apply when you return home. An immigration attorney can advise on your specific situation.

investment_thresholds_usd.currency_conversion: Convert to USD using daily cached rate before applying thresholds. Display rate used to user.
investment_thresholds_usd.note: No statutory minimum. Thresholds are advisory based on observed consulate practice.

post_payment_routing.solo: Load solo onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.partnership: Load partnership onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.family: Load spouse + children tabs in Module 3
post_payment_routing.risk_flags_present: Show persistent risk notes at relevant tabs

non_immigrant_intent_composite.description: After Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03 — count confirmed ties to home country

Q0-NI-01: Yes — and I plan to keep it
Q0-NI-02: Some will stay, some will come with me
Q0-NI-03: Yes — I plan to keep my accounts open
Probably — I have not decided yet

treaty_country_check.description: Q0-01 validates selected country against treaty_countries.json

version_notes: v3.0 - Updated for global treaty country support
Q0-01 now checks against treaty_countries.json instead of static options
Added Q0-E2: Prior E-2 application history (W-E2-DENIED, W-E2-PENDING)
Added Q0-STATE: Target U.S. state selector
Q0-10 now has sub_question for business type details
Q0-16 has sub_question for spouse relationship type (W-COMMONLAW)
Non-immigrant intent questions now use [home country] instead of Canada
Stage-aware routing: W-04 now triggers for Stage A/B users with uncommitted funds
